July 26th, 2023

•

[![Eric Ciarla image](https://www.mendable.ai/eric-img.jpeg)Eric Ciarla](https://x.com/ericciarla)

# Introducing Precise Mode for Mendable.ai

A Solution for More Controlled AI Conversations

![Introducing Precise Mode for Mendable.ai image](https://www.mendable.ai/precisemode.png)

Are you tired of asking, “How can I get my model to not talk about X?” At Mendable.ai, we understand this concern. As creators and innovators in the AI space, we have heard this query more times than we can count. So, we decided to rise to the occasion and tackle this issue head-on. "We are excited to unveil our latest feature - Precise Mode, developed with the assistance of our partners at LangChainAI."

### Understanding How Precise Mode Works

Complexity is often seen as a mark of genius. However, sometimes the best solutions are the simplest. Our approach to refining AI conversation abides by this ethos, comprising two key components: a moderation layer and prompt templates.

#### The Moderation Layer

The first step in achieving more controlled AI responses is our moderation layer. It functions as a gatekeeper, flagging any requests that contain text we, or the client, would prefer the model not to attempt answering. For instance, any sensitive topics, inappropriate content, or areas outside the model’s training can be flagged. If a user request is flagged, we provide feedback through a friendly, informative message, thus maintaining the user experience’s quality while ensuring content suitability.

#### Prompt Templates

After the moderation layer comes the exciting part - prompt templates. These are developed in collaboration with LangChainAI, designed to further constrict the model’s response parameters. For Precise Mode, we specify instructions like “Do not make up any part of an answer. If the answer isn’t in the sources, say X”. This approach ensures the AI responses adhere closely to the information available, providing the most accurate and helpful replies.

### The Advantage of GPT-4 in Following Prompts

While we have designed the Precise Mode to be effective with various AI models, it’s worth noting that GPT-4 has shown particularly promising results. GPT-4 follows these prompt directions far more reliably than its predecessor, GPT-3.5. If you’re aiming for more consistent and controlled AI interactions, GPT-4 is the recommended choice with Precise Mode.

However, we understand that not everyone has transitioned to GPT-4, and GPT-3.5 remains a popular choice. Don’t worry - we have you covered! There are specific prompt techniques that can considerably enhance the consistency of GPT-3.5. We are excited to share these tips in the future.

In conclusion, our latest feature - Precise Mode, aims to answer a longstanding question in AI conversation control. By combining a moderation layer with highly customized prompt templates, we offer a simple yet effective solution to controlling the topics your AI model can discuss. Welcome to a more precise, accurate, and controlled AI conversation experience with Mendable.ai. Stay tuned for more exciting updates and features!

## SOC 2 Type II Certified

# Security and privacy at Mendable

We take security and privacy very seriously at Mendable. Take a look at our security features below.

Product Security

#### Encryption in transit

Mendable uses TLS 1.2 or higher everywhere data is transmitted over potentially insecure networks..

#### Penetration Testing

Mendables engages with one of the best penetration testing firms in the industry, Oneleet, at least once a year. Email us to request a full report.

#### Vulnerability Scanning

Mendable uses automated vulnerability scanning tools to identify potential vulnerabilities in our applications and infrastructure.

Enterprise Security

#### Endpoint protection

All corporate devices are centrally managed and are equipped with device management software and anti-malware protection. Endpoint security alerts are monitored with 24/7/365 coverage.

#### Security education

Mendable provides comprehensive security training to all employees upon onboarding and annually through educational modules through Vanta’s platform.

#### SSO

Mendable provides SSO features for enterprises to manage their users and access to Mendable.

Frequently asked security questions

#### What security frameworks is Mendable compliant with?

Mendable is SOC 2 Type II compliant. Additionally, we will soon be making strides to become complaint in ISO 27K:2022 and GDPR.

#### Where does my data go when it is ingested to Mendable?

When you ingest your data into the Mendable ecosystem, it is stored on our database provider. However, your data is not used to train the underlying OpenAI models. OpenAI may hold onto conversation data for up to 30 days for content moderations purposes, however it will be subsequently deleted.

December 28th, 2023

•

[![Eric Ciarla image](https://www.mendable.ai/eric-img.jpeg)Eric Ciarla](https://x.com/ericciarla)

# Mendable.ai December Recap

Recapping the last month of the year at Mendable

![Mendable.ai December Recap image](https://www.mendable.ai/dec_2023.png)

Happy Holidays from the Mendable team 🎄. We are hoping everyone is enjoying the last of 2023, gearing up for a fresh start and renewed energy as we step into 2024.

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clqpnzujy01t911rgw4ff8r8s/clqpovhpp02hockveepcm10kg.png)

## Product Updates:

### Microsoft Teams Bot

A lot of our customers have been asking when we where going to release our MS Teams bot and we finally did! Spin up your own instance today: [https://docs.mendable.ai/integrations/teams](https://docs.mendable.ai/integrations/teams)

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clqpnzujy01t911rgw4ff8r8s/clqpppw9300cupbzxpeiriapz.jpg)

### Redesigned Insights

We heard from customers that our insights are almost as valuable as QA itself so we doubled down. New insights include:

- Quick Stats: Shows the number of questions and average conversation length
- No Answer Found Topics: Clusters where the model is not finding any sources or not answering. Requires that the precise mode prompt is being used.
- Most Clicked Keyword Sources: For those using Mendable as a keyword search solution, we provide a list of the most common searched for pages.

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clqpnzujy01t911rgw4ff8r8s/clqppwst4010gocirf32la2km.png)

### Sources First Mode UI

We now have “sources first mode” which displays the sources instantly before generating an answer so users can quick navigate to verified sources. Enable it in the component with `messageSettings.sourcesFirst`

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clqpnzujy01t911rgw4ff8r8s/clqppx82s009uhe5r3eqs18aa.png)

### And a lot more

- AI Zoom Sales Copilot: We built an AI sales copilot with Mendable that joins your meetings, gives you action items, and answers all the unanswered technical questions for a quick and easy follow up. Check it out: [here](https://twitter.com/nickscamara_/status/1734258042550583561)
- Workshop UI improvements: We focused on updating the workshop UI this month so customizing the model is easier than ever.

## General Updates:

The team hosted a Langchain x Mendable meetup at the Glasswing offices in Boston earlier this month. Thank you to Harrison from Langchain and Kleida from Glasswing for helping make this happen.

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clqpnzujy01t911rgw4ff8r8s/clqpp8fnw002y9j6zzlhb92s1.png)

That’s it for this update. Thank you for your continued support and stay tuned for more!

November 30th, 2023

•

[![Eric Ciarla image](https://www.mendable.ai/eric-img.jpeg)Eric Ciarla](https://x.com/ericciarla)

# Mendable.ai November Update

Exciting Updates to Kickoff the Holiday Season

![Mendable.ai November Update image](https://www.mendable.ai/nov_2023.png)

We are hoping everyone had a nice and productive November. Here is what the Mendable team has been up to:

## Product Updates:

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clpviexy30648la0olkuh2aik/clpvjpcwn00b5l70nk3pdmqbb.jpg)

- Auto syncing data sources: For data from websites and select OAuth sources we automatically update content daily.
- Chat insights feature (Beta): Our new insights beta feature allows you to see the most common topics of your chat data.
- Smart Project Router (Alpha): This new feature allows the AI to choose between multiple Mendable projects when responding to a query, leading to more accurate answers and better customizability. Currently in alpha testing and invite-only.
- Dashboard Copilot Actions: Manage projects using LUI (Add sources, Analyze data, Etc).
- Official Slack app: Quickly test and share projects where your team already works. Just click the “Add to Slack” button on the dashboard

## New Data Sources:

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clpviexy30648la0olkuh2aik/clpvjvt4q001ulh0nw0g00mec.jpg)

- Google Drive Data Connector: We now support Google Drive files for our easiest ingestion method yet. And the best part is that it auto-syncs every day!
- Github private repo support: We now support private Github repo ingestion.

## General Updates:

![](https://d3b9kr64nievew.cloudfront.net/clpviexy30648la0olkuh2aik/clpvlk6ksp0067l20qkfuauvqq.jpg)

- The team got to present Mendable at SnapAR’s Lens Fest. Thank you to Snap for the opportunity
- We are now live on the AutoGPT docs: [https://docs.agpt.co/](https://docs.agpt.co/)

That is all for us this month! Catch you next month 🚀

existing_assets.current_vibe: Informative, technical blog posts and security details with a focus on product updates and AI capabilities. The aesthetic is clean and straightforward, typical of a tech company's blog and security page, with embedded images to break up text.

proposed_strategy.content_strategy: The content, which is largely informative and technical (blog posts, security features, product updates), will be preserved entirely. For blog posts, this means maintaining the full articles. For the security page, all detailed explanations and FAQs will be retained. The 'Application error' page should be replaced with a proper, user-friendly error page. The core message of innovation in AI, security, and product development will be amplified through a more engaging presentation.
proposed_strategy.visual_audit: The current visual design is functional but lacks a distinct brand identity or modern aesthetic. Images are relevant but sometimes feel like placeholders. There's an opportunity to create a more cohesive and visually appealing experience that better reflects the cutting-edge nature of Mendable.ai's offerings. The typography and color palette are not explicitly defined in the provided markdown, suggesting a default or minimal styling. This will be an area for significant improvement.
proposed_strategy.structure_proposals:
1. **Blog Pages (`/blog/*`):** Each blog post will be presented with a modern blog layout. This includes: 
   - A prominent hero section with the main blog image and title. 
   - A clean reading experience with clear typography, line spacing, and paragraph breaks. 
   - A sidebar or bottom section with author information (image, name, link to social) and publication date. 
   - 'Related Posts' or 'More from the Blog' component as a carousel or grid for discoverability. 
   - Social sharing buttons. 
2. **Security Page (`/security`):** This page will benefit from a structured, easily digestible format: 
   - **Accordion Components:** For 'Product Security' and 'Enterprise Security' sections, individual features like 'Encryption in transit', 'Penetration Testing', 'Endpoint protection' etc., will be presented in a series of accordions. This allows users to quickly scan features and expand for details without overwhelming the page. 
   - **FAQ Section:** The 'Frequently asked security questions' will also use an accordion component to present questions and answers cleanly. 
   - **Clear Call to Action:** For requesting a full report or accepting/declining cookies, prominent buttons will be used. 
3. **Cookie Consent Banner:** A re-designed, non-intrusive cookie consent banner that is clearly visible but doesn't obstruct content, with 'Accept Cookies' and 'Decline Cookies' buttons. 
4. **Overall Navigation:** A consistent, clear navigation menu will be implemented across all pages.
proposed_strategy.animation_style:
Subtle, modern animations will enhance user interaction without distraction. 
- **Hover Effects:** For blog post cards, navigation links, and buttons, providing visual feedback. 
- **Scroll-triggered animations:** Gentle fades or slides for sections as they come into view, making the page feel dynamic. 
- **Loading spinners/skeletons:** For images or content that may take a moment to load, improving perceived performance. 
- **Modal animations:** For any pop-ups (e.g., cookie consent details) for a smooth transition.

proposed_strategy.vibe_description: A sophisticated, cutting-edge, and trustworthy vibe that reflects Mendable.ai's position as an innovator in the AI space. The design should feel intelligent, clean, and highly functional, ensuring clarity and ease of access to complex information. Emphasis on security, innovation, and user-centric design practices will be paramount. A color palette hinting at intelligence and trustworthiness (blues, grays, whites) with possibly a vibrant accent color for calls to action or key features. Typography will be modern and highly readable, suitable for long-form content and technical documentation.
